title: Project Z
description: Project Z: The Fall of Global Civilization is a Minecraft mod inspired by DayZ. Survive in a post-apocalyptic world with decaying cities, hunger, thirst, and zombie threats. Scavenge, build bases, and participate in dynamic events. Join our Discord for up
body:
🌍 **Project Z: The Fall of Global Civilization** 🌍

**Welcome to Project Z!**
Are you ready to survive the ultimate apocalypse in Minecraft? Dive into Project Z, a thrilling mod inspired by the intense survival dynamics of DayZ. Experience the challenge of navigating a post-apocalyptic world where every decision counts and danger lurks around every corner.

Mod Features:

**🏙️ Apocalyptic Environment**

Explore vast, decaying cities and desolate landscapes. Traverse abandoned urban environments and scavenge the remnants of civilization for essential resources.

**🍞 Survival Mechanics**

Manage complex systems of hunger, thirst, and stamina. Make strategic decisions to fend off starvation and dehydration while navigating through a hostile world.

**🔧 Scavenging and Crafting
**
Search abandoned buildings and vehicles for supplies. Use a robust crafting system to create weapons, tools, and shelters to increase your chances of survival.

**🧟 Zombie Threats
**
Stay alert and prepare for intense encounters with relentless zombie hordes. Engage in combat or use stealth tactics to evade these dangerous foes.

**📦 Dynamic Events
**
Participate in dynamic events such as air drops and supply runs. Encounter NPCs with unique quests and make critical choices to cooperate or compete for valuable resources.

**🏠 Base Building
**
Create and fortify your own safe haven. Collaborate with others to build and defend community strongholds, or choose to go it alone and face the challenges independently.

**🌐 Persistent World
**
Experience a persistent world where your actions shape the environment. Forge alliances, influence the player-driven economy, and leave your mark on the post-apocalyptic landscape.

**🤝 Multiplayer Experience
**
Team up with friends in multiplayer mode to tackle challenges together, or brave the wasteland solo. Form alliances, share resources, and work together to survive.

**Special Thanks:
**
A huge thank you to Timeless and Classics for providing the gun mod framework and models, which we will be customizing and enhancing beyond the current setup.

**Mod Status:
**
Currently in early development for Minecraft 1.18.2. Expect bugs and rapid changes as we refine and expand the mod's features.

**Join Our Team:
**
We are looking for talented asset developers, including builders, artists, and modelers, to help bring our vision to life. As a part of our team, you'll receive a share of our sales as payment for your contributions.

**Join Our Community:
**
Stay updated with the latest news, development highlights, and sneak peeks by joining our Discord Community. Be part of the journey and help shape the future of Project Z.

🔗 [Join Our Discord](https://discord.gg/TxpcgRcGHs)

**Final Words:
**
Prepare yourself for the ultimate survival challenge in Project Z. Gather your resources, watch your back, and survive at all costs!
